Package
Description
org.tquadrat.foundation.function
Functional interfaces for the Foundation Library.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.function used by org.tquadrat.foundation.function
    Class
    Description
    TriConsumer
    Represents an operation that accepts three input arguments and returns no result.
    TriFunction
    Represents an operation that accepts three input arguments and produces a result.
